default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Strategic session to review and align on GrowthX's proposed programmatic SEO strategy for RunPod's new articles section.](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=11.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [RunPod's domain performance is strong, but blog traffic is flat/declining; opportunity identified for programmatic SEO to boost traffic](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=189.0)
  - [New articles will live at runpod.io/articles, separate from blog.runpod.io](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [GrowthX presented content strategy, pillars, and templates; RunPod to review and approve](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=134.0)
  - [Immediate focus on creating content for instant clusters and bare metal campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)

## Topics

### Current SEO Performance

  - [RunPod domain: Increasing traffic and impressions over past 6 months](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=244.0)
  - [RunPod blog: Traffic flat/declining; opportunity to improve](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=251.0)
  - [Top performing post (Jan 25): Spike due to new deep-seek model release](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Top 10 posts include comparison and "how-to" content, signaling programmatic SEO potential](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

### Technical SEO Issues

  - [Sitemap last updated in 2022/2023, not currently found](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=195.0)
  - [RunPod team to locate/create updated sitemap for internal linking](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [GrowthX to manually input internal links for first week if needed](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)

### Competitor Analysis

  - [RunPod strategy on par with competitors (e.g., Corweave)](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Domain performing well, blog improvement needed](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Proposed Content Strategy

  - [6 main content clusters identified (e.g., cloud comparison, AI deployment)](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)
  - [Content OS presented with topics, keywords, search volumes, and difficulty](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=449.0)
  - [Templates created for each content type](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=852.0)
  - [RunPod to review and approve pillars/topics in Content OS](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=573.0)

### Content Structure and Separation

  - [New articles to live at runpod.io/articles](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)
  - [Separate from blog.runpod.io (managed by Alyssa)](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=515.0)
  - [Potential for future segmentation (e.g., runpod.io/guides)](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=527.0)

### Immediate Content Priorities

  - [Focus on instant clusters and bare metal content](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
  - [Aligns with RunPod's upcoming campaign (launching Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [GrowthX to add specific ideas for these topics by mid-day tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)

### Content Production Timeline

  - [Calibration articles: Early to mid-next week](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=1030.0)
  - [Week after: 5-10 additional articles](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Ramp up to full production following week](https://fathom.video/share/guignFjUTS_NSEGmiRo5fTVH8549-u4J?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)

## Next Steps

1.  RunPod to review and approve content templates and pillar topics
2.  GrowthX to add instant clusters and bare metal content ideas (by tomorrow)
3.  RunPod to approve priority articles for testing
4.  GrowthX to deliver calibration articles early-mid next week
5.  RunPod to provide detailed feedback on calibration articles
6.  Schedule earlier meeting time (Tuesday/Wednesday) for future sessions

action_items.description: Ping Luke re working sitemap. Send to GrowthX team when obtained
Review SEO templates w/ Alyssa. Ensure alignment w/ RunPod strategy
Send GrowthX more context on instant clusters & bare metal campaign
Add content ideas for instant clusters & bare metal to Content OS by mid-day tmrw
Send calibration articles to RunPod team by early/mid next week
Provide detailed feedback on calibration articles once received
Review/approve pillar topics for V1 in Content OS
Review new ideas for instant clusters & bare metal in Content OS tmrw
Reschedule weekly meeting - earlier in week & better time for Sydney
